title: Set Of 4 Butterfly Placemats & Coasters | 4 Kitchen Dining Table Coasters and Placemats | 8 Piece Table Place Mat Set
features: SET OF 4 PLACEMATS & COASTERS | This set includes 4 placemats and 4 matching coasters, each featuring a delicate butterfly design, perfect for brightening up your dining table
EASY CARE & CLEANING | Simply wipe the placemats and coasters with a damp cloth after use, making them low-maintenance and ideal for everyday or special occasion dining
TABLE MAT SET | With their intricate butterfly motif, these placemats and coasters add a touch of nature-inspired charm to any dining or kitchen table
VERSATILE & PRACTICAL | These placemats and coasters are perfect for protecting your table from heat, spills, and stains while adding a stylish flair to your mealtime setup
DIMENSIONS | The placemats measure 28x21.5 cm, coasters 10 cm, making them the perfect size for everyday use and easy storage
